chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2679 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge Direction. 1. For orders on Nazir’s Report dated 22.12.2022. 2. For orders on Nazir’s Report dated 02.01.2023. 3. For hearing of CMA No.5286/2023. 4. For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 08.10.2025. M/s. Shahab Sarki and Zulfiqar Ali Langha, Advocates for the Petitioner. Syed Aamir Ali, Advocate for the Respondent No.1. Mr. Imran Taj, Advocate for the Intervener. Mr. Abdul Basit, Advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, Advocate for Intervener. M/s. Ghulam Akbar Lashari and Rafique Bhanbhro, Advocates for SBCA. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith Ghazanfar Ali Abbasi-III, Deputy Secretary, Mushtaque Ali Wassan, SO (Litigation), LU. Department, BOR, Sindh and Ghulam Ali Wassan, Mukhtiarkar, Gulzar-e-Hijri, Scheme-33, Karachi. ------ The Report submitted today by Ghazanfar Ali Abbasi-III, Deputy Secretary, LU. Department, Board of Revenue, Sindh reflects the land of Graveyard in question to be 04-00 Acres, in Na-Class No.21, Sector 34-A of Deh Dozan, Scheme-33, Karachi Learned counsel for the Petitioner has invited attention of this Court to the Report dated 21.12.2022 submitted by the Mukhtiarkar, Gulzar-e-Hijri, Scheme-33, Karachi before the Nazir of this Court, specifically Paragraph-08 thereof, where the boundaries of the Graveyard have been identified. Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh as well as the Officials, present in Court, undertake that the land of the Graveyard as aforementioned will be preserved and kept free from all encroachments. In view of such undertaking, the purpose of the Petition appears to have been served.

Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh as well as the Officials, present in Court, undertake that the land of the Graveyard as aforementioned will be preserved and kept free from all encroachments. In view of such undertaking, the purpose of the Petition appears to have been served. Let the needful be ensured accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
